changes: Added intermediate wrapper div with class 'tabs-item-body md:flex-1' between </summary> and .tabs-item-inner
Removed PHP comment about JS-driven sticky positioning
Added matching intermediate wrapper div with className 'tabs-item-body md:flex-1' for editor structural parity
Preserved existing sticky classes on .tabs-item-inner (md:sticky md:top-[calc(var(--fixed-elements-height)+32px)] md:self-start)
Updated header comment to reflect CSS sticky approach with intermediate wrapper instead of JS-driven positioning
Removed transform clearing code in selectTab() forEach loop
Total: Approximately 45 lines of JS removed

warnings: Asset size limit warnings (expected - editor.js 337 KiB, screen entrypoint 373 KiB)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP both have matching intermediate wrapper div structure. TSX preserves md:self-start class for editor-specific rendering, which is appropriate.

implementation.summary: Successfully migrated from JavaScript-driven sticky positioning to native CSS position:sticky by adding an intermediate wrapper div between <details> and .tabs-item-inner. This resolves the browser limitation where sticky positioning fails on direct children of <details> elements.

domStructureChange.reasoning: The new wrapper div takes flex-1 to stretch full height on desktop, while .tabs-item-inner (no longer a direct child of <details>) can now use native CSS sticky positioning

cssApproach.note: Uses same offset as existing tablist sticky positioning. The CSS variable --fixed-elements-height accounts for any fixed header elements.

implementation.jsReduction: Removed ~45 lines of JS code that was simulating sticky behavior with transform:translateY on scroll. CSS sticky is declarative and requires no JS intervention.

fixesApplied.issue: JavaScript-driven sticky positioning using transform:translateY on scroll
fixesApplied.fix: Replaced with native CSS position:sticky by introducing intermediate wrapper div to work around <details> element limitation

testingNotes: Desktop: Verify sticky content stays pinned when scrolling long tab content
Desktop: Switch between tabs and verify new tab's content becomes sticky immediately
Desktop: Verify background color (bg-accent-lighter) fills full panel height
Desktop: Verify padding (p-6) on details element is visually unchanged
Desktop: Verify colored tabs (neon-green, blue, orange, purple) render correctly
Mobile: Verify accordion open/close behavior is unchanged
Mobile: Verify no sticky artifacts appear
Mobile: Verify accordion expand/collapse animation is smooth
Resize: Switch between desktop and mobile and verify mode transitions work
Keyboard: Verify ArrowUp/ArrowDown navigation still works on desktop
Verify --fixed-elements-height offset works correctly with sticky header
